description: The birthplace and childhood home of Lu Xun, including his former residence, Sanwei Study, and Baicao Garden.
A comprehensive scenic area combining Keyan rock formations, Jianhu lake views, and the cultural charm of Luzhen.
A private garden from the Song Dynasty, the site of the love story between Lu You and Tang Wan, where you can enjoy Yue Opera performances.
A comprehensive museum showcasing the history, culture, and local characteristics of Shaoxing.

An ancient bridge from the Song Dynasty, a transportation hub during the Southern Song period, surrounded by the pristine water town scenery, making it an excellent place to experience old Shaoxing life.
The world's largest natural bonsai landscape, where you can take a traditional black-awning boat into caves to view cliff carvings.
The birthplace of educator Cai Yuanpei, offering insights into the life, achievements, and ideological contributions of this pioneer of modern education reform.

attraction_name: Night Tour of the Ring City River
description: Take a traditional black-awning boat to tour the Shaoxing Ring Canal and experience the nighttime charm of the water town.
A traditional garden park in Shaoxing city, with a tranquil environment suitable for morning exercises and leisure.
